title: selaginella rupestris f. dregei
intro: Selaginella rupestris f. dregei, a species of flowering plant in the Selaginella genus, is a type of spore-bearing vascular plant that is native to the tropical regions of Africa. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine, particularly in South Africa, for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Selaginella rupestris f. dregei include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and boost the immune system. The plant is often prepared as a tea or infusion for its medicinal uses, and can also be found in herbal supplement form.
